author: codex

patch.value: Productionize GitHub Projects v2 bidirectional sync
Complete and harden pm-github Projects v2 import, push, pull, and sync workflows using the current pm CLI/SDK contracts, with safe provenance and status round trips for agent context management.

Projects v2 commands expose intuitive SDK command contracts; project item provenance survives pm tag normalization; push/pull status mapping is symmetric; existing tags are preserved during import updates; dry-run and add-missing safety semantics are tested; full release check passes; real authenticated read-only validation is recorded; no secrets or private data are tracked.
Existing feat/projects-v2-sync implementation and follow-up hardening are present; gh authentication is available; mutations use dry-run or isolated test data unless explicitly safe.
Agents can use GitHub Projects as a shared planning surface without losing pm context or corrupting status/provenance.
Adds production-grade multi-surface project context synchronization for pm-managed work.
Deterministic, tested, agent-friendly Projects v2 workflows with safe bidirectional mapping.
The implementation is already in progress and must be completed before the branch can be reviewed and released.

value.author: codex
value.text: Initial verification: git diff --check clean; npm test passed 78/78; npm run release:check passed including zero production vulnerabilities and changelog check.

value.author: codex
value.text: Existing uncommitted edits were present at session start and are preserved; pm-cli itself remains read-only.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm normalizes tags to lowercase, so case-sensitive GitHub node IDs require a reversible lowercase-safe provenance encoding.

value.note: Projects v2 planning mapping and provenance
typecheck build tests audit package and changelog gate

message: Track existing Projects v2 productionization work without duplicating the unrelated release chore

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Real-life SDK/CLI verification with pm 2026.7.11: local package install activated all nine command/action paths with health ok; read-only project list found unbraind/1; fields returned 18 fields and five Status options; default sync dry-run produced a push/pull plan without remote writes. GitHub security review: only alert is fixed CVE-2026-54285 in a dev transitive dependency; npm audit reports zero vulnerabilities.

message: Record authenticated real-world validation and GitHub security findings

value.author: codex
value.text: A repo-local local-source install is necessary to test newly registered nested extension commands; invoking the globally/previously installed extension correctly rejected the new path before activation.

patch.value: Projects v2 sync and follow-up safety fixes verified with 78 passing tests, full release gate, local SDK activation, authenticated read-only Projects API calls, and a no-write dry-run against real project data.
Implemented and verified Projects v2 bidirectional sync with status symmetry, tag-preserving imports, redirect credential isolation, and real CLI/API dry-run validation.
Projects commands are discoverable and safe by default; status/provenance round trips preserve data; release checks pass.
All nine package actions activated; 78 tests and release gate passed; authenticated list/fields/dry-run succeeded; no current vulnerabilities.

value.author: codex
value.text: Sourcery review remediation: removed ad-hoc _pmRoot mutation and hard-coded tracker fallback by passing ctx.pm_root explicitly into applyPushEntry; normalized README terminology to Projects v2. Full release gate rerun after changes.

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Greptile/Gemini round-two remediation: dry-run import now reads the local store for idempotent create/update planning; GraphQL fails early with token guidance; nullable project/item/field nodes are filtered or normalized; sync token requirement is explicit; malformed non-string provenance tags are safely rejected with regression coverage. Full release gate passes with 79 tests.

message: Record Greptile and Gemini robustness remediation
